guiAdapterCompositionRoots.reason: GUI may instantiate external adapters only at its local composition root.

cliAdapterCompositionRoots.reason: CLI adapter imports are confined to the CLI composition root until the boundary is derived from the consumer graph.
W5/F5 moves CLI adapter selection into an explicit registry composition root so commands request capabilities instead of importing concrete adapters.

kernelStoreCompositionRoots.reason: PLT-Bedrock W1 needs one public composition seam for local ArtifactStore and WriteCoordinator factories without exposing the internal store barrel.

kernelWriteInternalConsumers.reason: Only this exact package-internal edge may call the submission helper; the same consumer remains forbidden from every other store, persistence, and write-coordination target.
B7 explicitly promotes runLedgerMaterializer and its consumed report type at the kernel root; no other materialization internals are re-exported.
B7 documented coupling exposes only the daemon runtime's existing global-lock substrate; a proper port is follow-up work.
B7 documented coupling exposes only the daemon runtime's existing recovery substrate; a proper port is follow-up work.
B7 documented coupling exposes only the daemon queue's existing integrity-domain classifier; a proper port is follow-up work.
B7 documented coupling exposes only the daemon runtime's existing touched-path projection; a proper port is follow-up work.

daemonRuntimeSupportConsumers.reason: B7 documented coupling: only daemon-owned runtime modules may consume the exact kernel runtime substrate subpath; extracting a proper port is follow-up work outside B7.

cliAdapterKnownDebt.reason: Existing CLI command adapter import debt predates the external allowlist policy and is tracked as boundary debt.
